overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The player character explores the famous FF:06:B5 statue plaza, walks along wet streets with traffic, passes through a narrow alley with shops, and continues along a main cyberpunk boulevard with towering billboards and elevated highways.

events.description: approaching the large FF:06:B5 statue in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking toward the mysterious illuminated statue while rain falls heavily

entered.detail: massive illuminated structure with FF:06:B5 text glowing in gold
linear yellow LED strips embedded in the wet pavement
small terminal with blue glowing screen

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night plaza dominated by the massive FF:06:B5 statue illuminated in gold. The player approaches the statue while rain falls heavily, with neon lights from distant buildings visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street with vehicle traffic

events.description: exits the statue plaza onto the city street
cars drive past on the wet asphalt road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the street, observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: tall pole with bright white light cutting through the rain
metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza onto a city street, the player walks along the sidewalk as cars drive past on the rain-slicked asphalt. Street lamps cast pools of light through the rain, and distant neon signs illuminate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with shops and debris

events.description: turns left into a narrow alleyway with shops
passing by a shop with a glowing neon paw sign

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, observing the shop fronts and debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the distance near the alley exit

entered.detail: neon sign with paw print logo and pink glow
rectangular seating with trash scattered around
litter and trash scattered across the wet pavement
red automated machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow alley littered with debris and lined with small shops. A prominent neon 'Paw' sign glows on the right, while concrete benches and trash piles dot the wet pavement. The space feels more enclosed than the open street.

events.description: exits the alley into a covered area under the overpass
lighting becomes dimmer and cooler under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete overpass, heading toward the main street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway ramp overhead with support columns
red and white striped blocks lining the path
thick black cables hanging between buildings
modern structure with cyan illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the player enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Thick utility cables hang overhead, and concrete barriers line the path. The lighting shifts to a cooler tone as the player moves through this transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main cyberpunk boulevard with digital billboards

events.description: white van drives past on the street
passing massive digital billboards on building facades

agents.ego_description: walking along the main boulevard, taking in the towering cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road through the rain

entered.detail: massive screen displaying advertisements on building facade
multi-level highway structure with vehicles above
tall mixed-era structures with neon and glass facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a wide cyberpunk boulevard, the player walks past towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. An elevated highway looms overhead while vehicles navigate the rain-soaked streets below, creating a quintessential Night City atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy metropolis, transitioning from a monumental golden plaza into the claustrophobic depths of the city before emerging onto a sprawling neon boulevard. It begins with a steady approach toward the massive, gold-illuminated FF:06:B5 statue amidst heavy rain and a hazy glow. As the camera moves away from the plaza, the scene shifts to a rain-slicked city street where cars glide past under the flicker of distant neon signs, before turning sharply into a narrow, debris-strewn alley marked by a glowing Paw sign. The environment then tightens further as the player enters a covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass with hanging utility cables, shifting the lighting to a cooler, industrial tone. Finally, the space opens up completely as the camera emerges onto a wide boulevard dominated by towering digital billboards and an elevated highway looming overhead.
